zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionisia de Champernon於大約1280年出生在英國戴文易爾福拉可姆時，她的父親William Champernon52歲，母親Joan de Ferrers28歲。她和William de Botreaux至少有3個女兒。她去世於1334年5月17日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionisia de Champernon于大约1280年出生在英国戴文易爾福拉可姆时，她的父亲William Champernon52岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers28岁。她和William de Botreaux至少有3个女儿。她去世于1334年5月17日在英国英格兰可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dionisia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionisia de Champernon was born about 1280, in Ilfracombe, Devon, England, her father, William Champernon, was 52 and her mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 28. She had at least 3 daughters with William de Botreaux. She died on 17 May 1334, in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionisia de Champernon est née environ 1280, à Ilfracombe, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Champernon, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec William de Botreaux. Elle est décédée le 17 mai 1334, à Boscastle, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionisia de Champernon um 1280 in Ilfracombe, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Champernon 52 und ihre Mutter Joan de Ferrers 28. Sie hatte mit William de Botreaux mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Mai 1334 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionisia de Champernon è nata il circa 1280 nel Ilfracombe, Devon, England, sua padre, William Champernon, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Joan de Ferrers, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con William de Botreaux. Morì il 17 maggio 1334, nel Boscastle, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionisia de Champernonが約1280年にイギリスデボンイルフラコンベで生まれた時，父William Champernonは52歳，母Joan de Ferrersは28歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Botreauxとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1334年5月17日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルボスカストルで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionisia de Champernon(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 데폰 이프라코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Champernon(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 William de Botreaux(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 5월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보스카스틀에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionisia de Champernon nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Champernon, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com William de Botreaux. Ela faleceu em 17 de maio de 1334, em Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionisia de Champernon родилась около 1280 г. в местности илфракомб, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Champernon было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от William de Botreaux. Она умерла 17 мая 1334 г. в местности боскастл, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionisia de Champernon nació aproximadamente 1280, en Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Champernon, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con William de Botreaux. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1334, en Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
